comment: Utterance catalog for the M8.5 audio eval. eval/tts.mjs synthesizes each entry to eval/audio/<id>.wav (24kHz 16-bit mono PCM). Keep utterances ~2-3s spoken: the Chromium fake-capture device LOOPS the file, and the hold window (~3.5s) defines what is actually sent. silence.wav is generated programmatically (not TTS).

utterances.text: point at the save button
what am I looking at right now
show me two things I should try next
point at the save button in the toolbar
point at the open button in the toolbar
point at the export button in the toolbar
point at the settings button in the toolbar
point at the share button in the toolbar
point at the email address field
point at the password field
point at the subscribe to newsletter checkbox
point at the create account button
point at the search box
point at the add to cart button
point at the shopping cart icon
point at the price of the headphones
point at the customer reviews link
point at the save button, not save as
point at the save as button
point at the small bell notification icon
point at the help button in the bottom right corner of the screen
point at the big square in the center of the screen
